ads.consentDescription: If you consent, Google may use cookies and similar technologies to display and measure advertisements.

common.metadataDescription: A football social network for players and fans.
common.matchesShortcutDescription: Find and organize local football matches.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your FanPitch account.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used in the FanPitch interface.
settings.languageHint: Your choice is saved to your account and applies across devices.
settings.signOutDescription: Securely end your FanPitch session on this device.

login.title: Sign in to FanPitch
login.description: Use your email and password, or continue with Google.

register.title: Create your FanPitch account
register.description: Register with email, then verify your inbox before signing in.
register.name: Name

verification.successDescription: Your FanPitch account is ready. You can sign in now.
verification.failedDescription: This verification link is invalid or expired.

validation.mediaType: {name} must be a JPEG, PNG, WebP, MP4, WebM, or MOV file.

api.searchMin: Search must be at least 2 characters.
api.teamSearchUnavailable: Team search is unavailable right now.
api.inboxForbidden: You cannot subscribe to this inbox.

club.createLimit: You can create only one club for now.
club.ownerDeactivateOnly: Only the owner can deactivate a club.
club.ownerTransferOnly: Only the owner can transfer ownership.
club.transferFailed: Owner transfer could not be completed.
club.chooseNewOwner: Choose another active member as the new owner.
club.ownerSettingsOnly: Only the owner can update club settings.
club.notOpen: This club is not open for direct joining.
club.memberActive: This user is already an active club member.
club.invitePending: There is already a pending invite for this club.
club.requestPending: There is already a pending join request for this club.
club.requestsDisabled: This club does not accept join requests.
club.cannotApprove: You cannot approve join requests for this club.
club.notAwaitingApproval: This member is not waiting for approval.
club.cannotReject: You cannot reject join requests for this club.
club.cannotInvite: You cannot invite players to this club.
club.ownerInviteTdOnly: Only the club owner can invite a Technical Director.
club.clubOrUserNotFound: Club or user was not found.
club.inviteInactive: This invite is no longer active.
club.transferBeforeLeaving: Transfer ownership before leaving this club.
club.ownerRemoveOnly: Only the owner can remove members.
club.transferBeforeRemoveOwner: Transfer ownership before removing the current owner.
club.ownerRoleOnly: Only the owner can change member roles.
club.useTransfer: Use owner transfer to change the club owner.
club.guestForbidden: You cannot manage the guest list for this club.
club.metricLimit: A club can have up to 6 active metrics.
club.logoTooLarge: Logo must be 5 MB or smaller.
club.coverTooLarge: Cover image must be 5 MB or smaller.
club.logoUploadFailed: We could not upload that club logo. Try another image.
club.coverUploadFailed: We could not upload that cover image. Try another image.

match.activeClubRequired: Matches must be created from an active club.
match.cannotCreate: You cannot create matches for this club.
match.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage this match.
match.clubNotFound: One of the clubs was not found.
match.proposalNotPending: This proposal is no longer pending.
match.awayResponseForbidden: You cannot respond for the away club.
match.activeGuestRequired: Choose an active guest from this club.
match.playerAlreadyAssigned: This registered player is already assigned to a match side.
match.resultNotReady: This match is not ready for a result.
match.resultSubmitted: Result submitted for away club confirmation.
match.homeCannotConfirm: A home club manager cannot confirm its own result.
match.homeCannotReview: A home club manager cannot review its own result.
match.resultDisputed: Result disputed for future admin review.
match.videoAddLocked: Videos cannot be added after the match is finished.
match.videoUpdateLocked: Videos cannot be updated after the match is finished.
match.videoDeleteLocked: Videos cannot be deleted after the match is finished.
match.inviteNotFound: Active match invite was not found.

post.mediaNotConfigured: Media upload is not configured yet. Add Cloudinary settings and try again.
post.mediaUploadFailed: Media upload failed. Please try again.
post.saveFailed: Post could not be saved. Please try again.
post.parentCommentNotFound: The comment you are replying to was not found.
post.mainCommentsOnly: Replies can only be added to main comments.
post.notRepost: This post is not a repost.
post.mediaDeleteFailed: Post media could not be deleted from Cloudinary. Please try again.

message.friendsOnly: You can only message accepted friends.
message.deleteOwnOnly: You can only delete your own messages.

profile.imageType: Choose a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
profile.photoTooLarge: Profile photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
profile.coverTooLarge: Cover photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
profile.signInEdit: You need to sign in before editing your profile.
profile.uploadNotConfigured: Image upload is not configured yet. Add Cloudinary settings and try again.
profile.photoUploadFailed: We could not upload that profile photo. Try another image.
profile.coverUploadFailed: We could not upload that cover photo. Try another image.
profile.signInFavorites: You need to sign in before editing favorite teams.
profile.favoriteExists: That team is already in your favorites.
profile.favoriteLimit: You can save up to 5 favorite teams.

auth.databaseUnavailable: Database connection is unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
auth.verifyBeforeSignIn: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.signInFailed: Could not sign in with those details.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.useDifferentEmail: Use a different email or sign in.
auth.emailServiceUnavailable: Email verification service is not configured yet. Add mail settings and try again.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to verify it before signing in.
auth.verificationIfExists: If an account exists, a verification email has been sent.
auth.alreadyVerified: This email is already verified. You can sign in now.

friendship.cannotAddSelf: You cannot send a friend request to yourself.
friendship.onlyRecipientAccept: Only the recipient can accept this request.
friendship.onlyRecipientDecline: Only the recipient can decline this request.
friendship.onlyRequesterCancel: Only the requester can cancel this request.
friendship.onlyFriendsRemove: Only the friends can remove this friendship.

responses.localeInvalid: The selected language is not supported.
responses.signInRequired: Sign in to your account first.
responses.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
responses.lineupLocked: This match lineup can no longer be changed.
responses.goalLocked: This match's goals can no longer be changed.
responses.scorerInvalid: The selected scorer is not active on this side.
responses.scorerNameMissing: The player's name could not be determined.
responses.resultMismatch: The result does not match recorded goals. The current score is {score}. Add the goal scorers first.

validation.clubSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.playerChoice: Choose exactly one registered player or guest.
validation.supportedVideo: Only Google Drive and YouTube video links are currently supported.
validation.mediaType: The media file type is not supported.
validation.mediaSize: The media file exceeds the allowed size.
validation.mediaLimit: Choose no more than the allowed number of media files.
validation.postContentRequired: Add text or media before posting.

home.title: FanPitch brings players, fans, clubs, and local matches into one place.
home.description: Create your profile, share football posts, find players nearby, build clubs, and organize the next match without losing the thread.
home.highlightProfile: Build a player profile that feels like your football CV.
home.highlightPosts: Post match plans, quick takes, photos, and future highlights.
home.highlightClubs: Create clubs and organize local football matches.

search.title: Search
search.description: Find players by name, username, club, position, or city.
search.initialHint: Search for players to view profiles and send friend requests.
search.minLength: Type at least 2 characters to search players.

install.installed: FanPitch is installed on this device.
install.ready: FanPitch can be installed from this browser.
install.dismissed: Install was dismissed. You can try again from the browser menu.
install.title: Install FanPitch

page.metadataDescription: Install FanPitch as a fast app on your device.
page.title: FanPitch belongs on your home screen.
page.description: Open matches, posts, friends, and teams in a focused app window with the same FanPitch account.

offline.title: FanPitch is waiting for a connection.
offline.description: Some cached parts of the app may still open, but live football posts, teams, friends, and matches need internet access.

notFound.title: Looks like the ball went out of play.
notFound.description: The page may have been removed, moved, or never existed. Use one of the links below to return to the game.

errorState.title: The game has paused briefly.
errorState.description: There was a problem displaying this page. Try again or safely return to the home page.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: Likes, comments, messages, and friend requests will appear here.
notifications.pageDescription: Activity from friends, posts, and direct messages.

direct.incompleteResponse: Message was saved, but the response was incomplete.
direct.noFriendsDescription: Accepted friends will appear here so you can start a direct message.
direct.friendsDescription: All accepted friends are available for direct messages.
direct.noMessagesDescription: Send the first message to start this conversation.

composer.emptyError: Add text or media before posting.

deleteDialog.title: Delete post?
deleteDialog.description: This post and its comments will be removed. Uploaded media will also be deleted from Cloudinary.

create.title: Create Post
create.description: Share a football update with the main flow.

feed.title: Home
feed.emptyDescription: Start the feed by sharing your first football thought, match plan, or photo.

editForm.title: Edit profile
editForm.name: Name
editForm.privateHint: Private profiles are visible only to accepted friends.

favoriteTeams.minSearch: Search must be at least 2 characters.
favoriteTeams.searchUnavailable: Team search is unavailable right now.
favoriteTeams.title: Favorite teams

summary.bioFallback: Add a short football bio so nearby players know your style.

pages.friendsDescription: Manage friend requests from your profile on mobile.
pages.privateDescription: This account is private. Become friends to view the full profile.

card.acceptInviteHint: Open the club members page to accept this invite.

settingsForm.deactivateDescription: Deactivation keeps club history but blocks new members, matches, and settings changes.

index.title: Clubs
index.description: Create and manage your football workspace.
index.myClubsDescription: Active memberships, invitations, and join requests.
index.noClubTitle: You do not have a club yet
index.noClubDescription: Create your first club to gather your team and manage matches.
index.discoverDescription: Recently active clubs you can join or request to join.
index.noResultsDescription: Try searching again with another keyword.
index.noDiscoverDescription: New clubs will appear here when they are created.

new.title: Create a club
new.description: One club per user is available in this phase.

members.title: Club members
members.description: {active} active members. {pending} join requests need attention.

guests.title: Guest list
guests.description: Repeated non-account players for future match selection.

metrics.title: Internal metrics
metrics.description: Define up to 6 club-specific player metrics.

detail.noDescription: This club has not added a description yet.
detail.matchesDescription: Create matches separately from posts, add club members, and follow completed games.

resultForm.title: Submit result for confirmation
resultForm.description: The score is calculated from the recorded goal scorers.

resultConfirmation.title: Confirm result
resultConfirmation.description: The away side must confirm the result.

summary.actionsPlaceholder: Match actions will appear here when available for its status.

videoForm.startSecond: Second where the match starts in the video
videoForm.supportedProviders: Only Google Drive and YouTube links are supported.
videoForm.seekNotice: Seeking to an exact second can be limited on Google Drive. It is more reliable on YouTube.

videos.empty: No match videos have been added.
videos.driveSeekNotice: Seeking to an exact second can be limited on Google Drive.
videos.externalUnsupported: An embedded player is not supported for this link.

dashboard.addVideoBeforeSeek: Add a video before jumping to a minute.
dashboard.seekUnsupported: Seeking to an exact second is not supported for this video.

index.title: Club matches
index.description: Matches are created from clubs, not as individual posts.
index.noClub: Join or create a club before creating a match.

club.title: Club matches
club.description: Matches are created and managed by the club, separately from posts.

pitch.title: Pitch
pitch.description: Players are placed according to their selected positions.
pitch.editDescription: Drag and release a ring — the player will snap to the nearest position.
